_comment: Hand-maintained corrections. Overrides ALWAYS win and survive every re-scrape. Keys are grotto names (case-insensitive, whitespace-collapsed) matching the API roster name. Keys starting with '_' are ignored. Fields: exclude (bool), town, state, lat, lng (pin a town centroid), name, contact_url, note. See README 'How overrides work'.

_example_coordinate_fix.note: EXAMPLE ONLY (key starts with _ so it is ignored). To fix a mislocated grotto, copy this under its exact name: "Some Grotto": { "lat": 35.123, "lng": -86.456, "note": "why" }

Detroit Urban Grotto.note: Removed at maintainer request (its page address geocoded to Everett, WA).

Gila Area Grotto.note: Page has no address block. Town from its caves.org description: 'meeting in Silver City'.

Colorado School of Mines Grotto.note: Page has no address block. Colorado School of Mines is in Golden, CO.

Grotto of the Ancients.note: Page has no usable address. Town from its caves.org description: 'serving the 4 corners region including Cortez and Durango'.

Druid City Grotto.note: Page has no address block. 'The Druid City' is the established nickname for Tuscaloosa, AL.

Pittsburgh Grotto.note: Legacy lists the town typo'd as 'McKeespot'; corrected to McKeesport. Website provided by maintainer.

Battlefield Area Troglodyte Society.note: Neither the page nor the legacy list has an address. Town + website provided by maintainer.

Harrison Crawford Grotto.note: Neither the page nor the legacy list has an address. Town provided by maintainer.

Shasta Area Grotto.note: Neither the page nor the legacy list has an address. Town + website provided by maintainer.

Syracuse University Outing Club.note: Page name variant didn't auto-match the legacy list; town from legacy 'Syracuse University Outing'.

Northern Colorado Mountain Grotto.note: Page name variant didn't auto-match; town from legacy 'Northern Colorado Grotto'.

Greater Randolph Organization for Speleo.note: Page name variant didn't auto-match; town from legacy 'Greater Randolph (GROSS)'.
